name: devroom
description: DevRoom — Real-time Collaborative Code Editor (MERN + Socket.io)

scripts.setup:
cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && echo '
✅ Setup complete! Next:
  1. Copy backend/.env.example to backend/.env
  2. Copy frontend/.env.example to frontend/.env
  3. Fill in MONGO_URI
  4. Run: npm run seed
  5. Run: npm run dev
'
